title: rubus franchetianus
intro: Rubus franchetianus, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus franchetianus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and aid in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Rubus franchetianus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections.
